
```{r}
#PCoA=====
beta_bray<-vegdist(species_abundance_table,method="bray")
beta<-as.matrix(beta_bray)

pcoa <- cmdscale (beta,eig=TRUE)
pc12 <- as.data.frame(pcoa$points[,1:2])
pc12$id <- row.names(pc12)
colnames(pc12)[1:2]<-c("PCoA1","PCoA2")
head(pc12)

pc <- round(pcoa$eig/sum(pcoa$eig)*100,digits=2)
df <- merge(pc12,metadata_table[,c("id","GDM")],by="id")

#PERMANOVA=====
set.seed(123)
permanova<- adonis2(beta_bray ~ GDM, data = metadata_table, permutations = 9999)
permanova
adonis_label <- paste0("Adonis R2: ",round(permanova$R2,3), "; P-value: ", permanova$`Pr(>F)`)[1]
adonis_label

#plot=====
p1<-ggplot(data=df,aes(x=PCoA1,y=PCoA2,
                       color=GDM,shape=GDM))+
  stat_ellipse(data=df,geom = "polygon",level=0.95,linetype = 2,size=0.2,
               aes(fill=GDM),alpha=0.3,show.legend = T)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('#8BABD3','#D7B0B0'))+
  theme_bw()+
  geom_point(size=2)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0,lty="dashed")+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0,lty="dashed")+
  labs(x=paste0("PCoA 1 (", pc[1], "%)"),
       y=paste0("PCoA 2 (", pc[2], "%)"),
       title=adonis_label) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c('#8BABD3','#D7B0B0'))+
  
  theme(axis.title.x=element_text(size=12),
        axis.title.y=element_text(size=12,angle=90),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=10),
        axis.text.x=element_text(size=10),
        panel.grid=element_blank()
  )

df1<-df
df1$GDM<-as.character(df1$GDM)
xplot<-ggplot(df,aes(GDM,PCoA1,fill=GDM))+
  geom_boxplot(size=0.4,outlier.colour="grey",outlier.size=0.8)+  
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("Control","GDM")))+  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('#8BABD3','#D7B0B0'))+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),  
        axis.ticks=element_blank(), 
        axis.text = element_blank(), 
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        legend.position = 'none')+
  ylab("PCoA1")+
  coord_flip()

yplot<-ggplot(df,aes(GDM,PCoA2,fill=GDM))+
  geom_boxplot(size=0.4,outlier.colour="grey",outlier.size=0.8)+  
  stat_compare_means(comparisons =list(c("Control","GDM")))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c('#8BABD3','#D7B0B0'))+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),  
        axis.ticks=element_blank(), 
        axis.text = element_blank(), 
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        legend.position = 'none')+
  ylab("PCoA2")

layout <- "
AAAA#
BBBBC
BBBBC
BBBBC
"
p_merge<-xplot + p1 + yplot + 
  plot_layout(design = layout,guides = 'collect')
p_merge
```
